name: Brevo
description: Drive Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) — transactional email/SMS, marketing campaigns, contacts and lists — from any AI agent. 14 tools, api-key header auth, EU-based deliverability.
instructions:
This connector uses the Brevo REST API v3 (formerly known as Sendinblue API).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://app.brevo.com → top-right avatar → **SMTP & API → API Keys → Generate a new API key**.
2. Name it ('AnythingMCP'). It's prefixed `xkeysib-`. Set `BREVO_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: custom header `api-key: ${BREVO_API_KEY}` (lowercase header name — Brevo-specific). The adapter sets it via API_KEY profile.

**Verified sender**: just like SendGrid, you must verify your sending domain or sender email before transactional email actually delivers (otherwise it lands in spam or is rejected). Brevo → **Senders & IP → Senders → Add a sender** OR domain authentication via SPF/DKIM.

**Transactional vs Marketing**: `brevo_send_transactional_email` is for app-triggered 1-to-1 sends (receipts, password resets). `brevo_create_email_campaign` + `brevo_send_email_campaign_now` are for newsletter-style sends to a list. Pricing tiers are split per channel.

**Contact lists vs folders**: contacts can belong to multiple `lists`. Lists can be organized into `folders` (for UI tidiness; folders have no behavioral meaning). Use `brevo_list_contact_lists` to discover list IDs.

**Custom attributes**: each contact has `attributes` (FIRSTNAME, LASTNAME, plus any you define). Set them in `brevo_create_contact` via the `attributes` object: `{FIRSTNAME:'Jane', LANGUAGE:'fr'}`.

**Pagination**: most list endpoints use `limit` (max 50 typically, 100 for some) + `offset`.

**SMS sending**: also via the API. `brevo_send_transactional_sms` requires a verified sender name (≤11 chars, alphanumeric) AND the recipient phone in international format with `+` prefix.

**Webhooks** out of scope (configured in UI for delivery to your hosted endpoint).

**Rate limits**: ~400 req/sec for transactional email, lower for management endpoints. On 429, `Retry-After` is set.

**Out of scope here**: WhatsApp Business via Brevo (use the dedicated WhatsApp Business connector), CRM/deals (separate Brevo product, not on the same API surface), conversations, automation workflows, attribute creation.

tools.name: brevo_get_account
tools.description: Return account info: companyName, email, firstName, lastName, address, plan (credits, type, creditsType), relay servers. Health check + plan visibility.

tools.name: brevo_send_transactional_email
tools.description: Send a transactional email. Required: sender + to + (subject AND htmlContent/textContent) OR templateId+params. For templates, design + variables come from Brevo's UI templates.

sender.description: {email, name?}. email MUST be a verified sender.

to.description: Recipients: [{email, name?}]. Up to 50 per call (more = use bulk endpoint).

textContent.description: Plain-text body. Recommended alongside htmlContent for deliverability.

templateId.description: Brevo template ID. Omit subject/htmlContent if using.

params.description: Template variables (referenced as {{params.X}} in the template).

attachment.description: Up to 100 attachments: [{name, content (base64)}] or [{name, url}].

tags.description: Up to 5 tag strings for stats grouping.

scheduledAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime to schedule the send (up to 72h ahead).

tools.name: brevo_send_transactional_sms
tools.description: Send a transactional SMS. Required: sender (≤11 alphanumeric chars, must be pre-approved), recipient (international format with +), content (≤160 chars per part).

sender.description: Alphanumeric sender name ≤11 chars, must be pre-registered in Brevo.

recipient.description: Phone in international format with leading +, e.g. '+33612345678'.

content.description: SMS body. Per SMSC encoding (GSM-7 = 160 chars/part, UCS-2 = 70 chars/part).

unicodeEnabled.description: true = allow non-GSM chars (emoji, é, ç) — encoding flips to UCS-2.

tools.name: brevo_list_contacts
tools.description: List contacts (paginated). Each contact has id, email, attributes object, createdAt, modifiedAt, listIds[].

modifiedSince.description: ISO 8601 — only contacts modified after this time.

tools.name: brevo_get_contact
tools.description: Fetch a contact by email or ID.

identifier.description: URL-encoded email address OR numeric contact ID.

tools.name: brevo_create_contact
tools.description: Create or update a contact (upsert by email). Set `listIds` to add to existing lists. `updateEnabled:true` to update if email already exists (default false → 409 on duplicate).

ext_id.description: External ID if you maintain a separate identifier system.

attributes.description: {FIRSTNAME, LASTNAME, SMS:'+33...', LANGUAGE:'fr', custom...}. Reserved attrs are uppercase.

emailBlacklisted.description: true = mark as unsubscribed from emails.

smsBlacklisted.description: true = mark as unsubscribed from SMS.

listIds.description: Array of list IDs to add to.

updateEnabled.description: true = update existing if email already exists. Default false.

tools.name: brevo_update_contact
tools.description: Partial update of an existing contact.

listIds.description: Lists to ADD to (use unlinkListIds to remove).

tools.name: brevo_list_contact_lists
tools.description: List contact lists. Each list has id, name, folderId, totalSubscribers, totalBlacklisted, createdAt.

tools.name: brevo_create_contact_list
tools.description: Create a new list. Each list belongs to a folder (use brevo_list_folders to discover folderId).

tools.name: brevo_list_email_campaigns
tools.description: List email campaigns (newsletters). Filter by type (classic/trigger) and status (suspended/archive/sent/queued/draft/inProcess).

status.description: suspended, archive, sent, queued, draft, inProcess.

tools.name: brevo_create_email_campaign
tools.description: Create an email campaign (does NOT send — see brevo_send_email_campaign_now to fire). Required: name, subject, sender (verified), htmlContent OR templateId.

sender.description: {name?, email|id}. email must be verified, OR id of a sender object.

htmlContent.description: HTML body OR omit if using templateId.

scheduledAt.description: ISO 8601 — schedule. Omit to leave as draft.

tools.name: brevo_send_email_campaign_now
tools.description: Send a previously-created email campaign immediately (overrides any scheduledAt). The campaign must pass Brevo's content/sender checks first.

tools.name: brevo_get_transactional_email_report
tools.description: Get aggregated transactional email stats for a date range: total requests, delivered, hardBounces, softBounces, opened, clicked, spam.
